languages.text: "Это..." {n}Женщина взволнованно сжимает аквилу на груди.{/n} "Мы глубочайше признательны вам, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}!"

languages.text: "This is..." {n}Overcome by emotion, the woman grasps the Aquila on her chest.{/n} "We are deeply grateful, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Das ist..." {n}Von Rührung überwältigt, hält die Frau den Aquila an ihrer Brust fest.{/n} "Wir sind zutiefst dankbar, o himmlischer Gesandter!"
languages.original_text: "This is..." {n}Overcome by emotion, the woman grasps the Aquila on her chest.{/n} "We are deeply grateful, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "C'est..." {n}Sous le coup de l'émotion, la femme saisit l'Aquila sur sa poitrine.{/n} "Nous vous sommes profondément reconnaissants, ô Envoyé céleste !"
languages.original_text: "This is..." {n}Overcome by emotion, the woman grasps the Aquila on her chest.{/n} "We are deeply grateful, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "这是......"{n}女人激动地紧紧抓住胸前的 Aquila。{/n}"我们深表感激，天国的使者啊！"
languages.original_text: "This is..." {n}Overcome by emotion, the woman grasps the Aquila on her chest.{/n} "We are deeply grateful, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Esto es..." {n}Abrumada por la emoción, la mujer agarra el Aquila en su pecho.{/n} "¡Estamos profundamente agradecidos, oh Enviado Celestial!"
languages.original_text: "This is..." {n}Overcome by emotion, the woman grasps the Aquila on her chest.{/n} "We are deeply grateful, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "これは..."{n}感動に打ちひしがれ、女性は胸のアクイラを握りしめる。{/n}"天の使者よ、深く感謝いたします！"
languages.original_text: "This is..." {n}Overcome by emotion, the woman grasps the Aquila on her chest.{/n} "We are deeply grateful, o Heavenly Envoy!"

languages.text: "Bu..." {n}Duygularına yenik düşen kadın Aquila'yı göğsünde kavrıyor.{/n} "Çok minnettarız, ey Cennet Elçisi!"
languages.original_text: "This is..." {n}Overcome by emotion, the woman grasps the Aquila on her chest.{/n} "We are deeply grateful, o Heavenly Envoy!"
